title: RealmsAddon
description:
Minecraft Fabric Mod for TelosRealms! Features: Autoswing, Range indicator, Teleport Menu, Bag Tracker, and more!

Formerly known as TelosAddon
body:
Minecraft Fabric Addon for TelosRealms!
Please note this is a third party mod and is not affiliated with Telos Realms.

### Features:
- Autoswing
- Teleport Menu
- Range indicator
- Discord RPC
- Bag tracker & other stats!

You can open the Menu with 'b' and change the Keybind in your Minecraft Settings!

Discord for Updates, Issues, Changes and Opinions:
https://discord.gg/sDDeDkxFF6

Formerly known as TelosAddon
